bead.title: code-health: extract buildPreservedResult to collapse the preserve* LandResult scaffold (5 sites)
bead.description:
PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE: cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_land.go preserveIfPostLandGateFailsLocked:1466, preserveAfterEvidenceFailure:1492, preserveIfLargeDeletion:1540, preserveIfSyntaxSanityFails:1622 each build the same &LandResult{Status:"preserved", PreserveRef, Reason, TargetBranch, MergedCommitCount} after landIterationRef + UpdateRefTo(preserveRef).

PROPOSED FIX: Add pinPreserveRef(gitOps, wd, req, tip) (preserveRef string, err error) and buildPreservedResult(req, preserveRef, reason string, contribCount int) *LandResult; call from the 4 functions. Keep the bespoke target-ref revert logic in each caller (it differs).

NON-SCOPE: do NOT alter revert order or gate thresholds. Behavior-preserving (preserve-ref names/reasons unchanged).
bead.acceptance:
1. The 4 preserve* functions construct LandResult via the helper.
2. Preserve-ref names and reasons unchanged — assert via existing land/preserve tests.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
